generated_oml:
instance PhotometricSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors modeled within BIM environments for photometric values, validated by Eclipse Ditto for value ranges and units"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhotometricDataTransmitted
]

instance PhotometricDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhotometricSensor
]

instance PhotometricData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Photometric values data from lighting sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhotometricDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance RevitBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Revit-based Building Information Modeling (BIM) model enriched with device metadata for sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance MDEFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for transforming BIM models into structured DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for message delivery in data management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for policy-based validation and persistent storage of sensor and actuator data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems through continuous data synchronization with physical infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStatusInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interfaces for immersive system oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for operational forecasting and maintenance scheduling"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceForecastInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control capabilities for managing physical assets through remote actuation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteActuationAction
]

instance SystemStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system status information for facility management"
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization of building systems for operational oversight"
]

instance MaintenanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance scheduling and energy efficiency optimization"
]

instance RemoteActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control of lighting and HVAC systems with policy-based validation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building in AECO domain comprising Building Control System components"
    base:contains PhotometricSensor, LightActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance LightActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator controlled via LightTwinComponent behavioral component"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator controlled via HVACTwinComponent behavioral component"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for component integration, central hub orchestration of roles (Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers) for bidirectional data exchange and holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)-based extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable artifacts, real-time data synchronization between physical and digital systems, Facility Manager-driven monitoring and control operations, and evolution through modular integration of custom services by DT Engineers."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity and validity are maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation for sensor data and actuator command pre-execution checks, ensuring compliance with value ranges and units. Fault tolerance is provided by Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, preventing data loss during network failures and maintaining synchronization."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is supported through standardized extension points for custom services and analytics, leveraging BIM models as the foundational data source; specific data exchange protocols, interoperability standards, dependencies on external systems, or integration patterns with other Digital Twins are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with BIM standards for device modeling and a unified semantic foundation for data schemas ensures interoperability, while standardized extension points support integration of custom services, addressing fragmented data schemas and enhancing system scalability."
]
